---
output: github_document
---

# scPathway

`scPathway` is a lightweight R package for pathway analysis in single-cell RNA-seq.

## Install (development)

```r
source("scripts/setup_dev.R")
source("scripts/check_env.R")
```

## Matrix workflow

```r
library(scPathway)
data("toy_expr", package = "scPathway")

res <- score_pathway(
  expr = toy_expr$expr,
  meta = toy_expr$meta,
  geneset = "immune_small",
  seurat = FALSE,
  method = "rank"
)

cmp <- compare_groups_within_celltype(
  score = res,
  group = "group",
  celltype = "celltype",
  target_celltype = "CD8_T",
  level = "cell"
)

plot_violin(res, pathway = rownames(res$score)[1], group = "group")
```

## Seurat v5 workflow

```r
# Requires Seurat/SeuratObject installed
# seu <- ...
# res <- score_pathway(
#   object = seu,
#   geneset = "hallmark",
#   seurat = TRUE,
#   assay = "RNA",
#   layer = "data",
#   method = "ensemble"
# )
```
